moqui.math.ParameterDef.description: Cycle time in milliseconds for the test PLC
Program profile name loaded on the test PLC
Speed setpoint in rpm for the test drive
Torque limit percentage for the test drive
Gateway operating mode for UI and gateway tests
Polling interval in milliseconds for the test gateway
Heartbeat interval in milliseconds for the test device group
Main numeric reference used by the generic gateway MQTT/OPCUA test flows
Feedback value published by the PLC in the generic gateway test flows
Primary PLC control word for the gateway write test
Primary PLC status word for the gateway read test
PLC fault flag used by generic gateway tests
Reference value exported inside the generic PLC recipe file
State value exported inside the generic PLC recipe file
Standard moqui-plc framework enable command from ec.gvl
Standard moqui-plc framework init command from ec.gvl
Standard moqui-plc framework fault flag from ec.gvl
Standard moqui-plc framework error flag from ec.gvl
Standard moqui-plc framework communication error flag from ec.gvl
Standard moqui-plc framework reset command from ec.gvl
Standard moqui-plc framework auto-reset command from ec.gvl
Standard moqui-plc framework all-config-loaded flag from ec.gvl
Standard moqui-plc framework retry counter from ec.gvl
Standard moqui-plc framework retry time from ec.gvl
Standard moqui-plc framework primary-role flag from ec.gvl
Standard moqui-plc framework heartbeat counter from ec.gvl
Standard moqui-plc framework log appender enable flag from ec.gvl
Standard moqui-plc framework parameter publish enable flag from ec.gvl
Standard moqui-plc framework parameter subscribe enable flag from ec.gvl

moqui.device.Device.description: Minimal test control cell grouping one PLC, one drive and one gateway
Minimal test PLC for SimpleScreens and telemetry scenarios
Minimal test drive for SimpleScreens and telemetry scenarios
Minimal test edge gateway for SimpleScreens and telemetry scenarios

moqui.device.DeviceGroupMember.description: PLC member for the minimal test cell
Drive member for the minimal test cell
Gateway member for the minimal test cell

mantle.work.effort.WorkEffort.description: Synthetic work effort used to attach telemetry measurements to DG_EDGE_01
Synthetic work effort used to attach telemetry measurements to VIRTUAL_PLC_01
Synthetic work effort used to attach telemetry measurements to DRV_EDGE_01
Synthetic work effort used to attach telemetry measurements to GW_EDGE_01

moqui.device.DeviceConfig.description: Factory defaults for the minimal test device group
Factory defaults for the minimal test gateway
Factory defaults for the minimal test PLC
Production profile for the minimal test PLC
Gateway recipe export profile for the minimal test PLC

moqui.device.DeviceRuleSet.description: Minimal factory-default rule set for the test cell group

moqui.device.DeviceRule.description: Apply group-level factory defaults to the test cell
Apply gateway factory defaults inside the test cell

moqui.device.DeviceRuleSet.description: Minimal PLC rule set used to exercise apply#DeviceConfig from the UI

moqui.device.DeviceRule.description: Apply the factory PLC profile to the test PLC
Apply the production PLC profile to the test PLC

moqui.device.DeviceRuleSet.description: Gateway recipe export rule set for the minimal test PLC

moqui.device.DeviceRule.description: Gateway recipe export rule for the minimal test PLC

moqui.device.DeviceRequest.description: Dispatch DeviceConfig export for the minimal test PLC via moqui-device-gateway
Dispatch live parameter sync for the minimal test PLC via moqui-device-gateway
Gateway-side MQTT write request that publishes current PLC parameter values
Generic MQTT publish request mirroring moqui-device-gateway integration tests
Generic MQTT subscription request mirroring moqui-device-gateway integration tests
Generic MQTT unsubscribe request mirroring moqui-device-gateway integration tests
Generic OPC UA subscription request mirroring moqui-device-gateway integration tests
Generic OPC UA unsubscribe request mirroring moqui-device-gateway integration tests
Generic OPC UA write request mirroring moqui-device-gateway integration tests
Generic OPC UA one-shot read request mirroring moqui-device-gateway integration tests
Standard live-parameter MQTT request for moqui-plc MqttParameterSub
Standard moqui-plc framework control write request
